info.name: Rapido Backend - Complete API Collection
info.description: Full end-to-end Postman collection for Rapido backend. Covers Auth, Driver, Rider, Rides, Payments, Admin, Notifications, SOS, Support, WebSocket, and Health. All requests auto-chain variables via test scripts.

exec: pm.test('Status healthy', () => { const b = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(b.status).to.eql('healthy'); });
pm.test('OTP sent', () => { const b = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(b.success).to.be.true; });
pm.test('Has has_password field', () => { const b = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(b.data).to.have.property('has_password'); });
pm.test('Has fare data', () => { const b = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(b.data).to.exist; });

item.name: 08 - Rides - Full E2E Flow
item.description: Run these in order: Driver goes online → Rider requests → Driver accepts → arrived → start → complete → pay → rate

body.raw:
{
  "vehicle_type": "bike",
  "pickup_lat": 19.0760,
  "pickup_lng": 72.8777,
  "pickup_address": "Mumbai, Andheri East",
  "dropoff_lat": 19.0178,
  "dropoff_lng": 72.8478,
  "dropoff_address": "Mumbai, Bandra West",
  "payment_method": "wallet",
  "preferences": {
    "ac_required": false,
    "female_driver_only": false,
    "luggage_space": false,
    "silence_mode": false
  }
}

exec: pm.test('Status is ongoing', () => { const b = pm.response.json(); if (b.data) pm.expect(b.data.status).to.eql('ongoing'); });
pm.test('Status is completed', () => { const b = pm.response.json(); if (b.data) pm.expect(b.data.status).to.eql('completed'); });

item.name: Driver Reject Ride
item.description: Request a new ride first, then use driver token to reject

body.raw:
{
  "vehicle_type": "bike",
  "pickup_lat": 19.0760,
  "pickup_lng": 72.8777,
  "pickup_address": "Mumbai, Andheri East",
  "dropoff_lat": 19.0178,
  "dropoff_lng": 72.8478,
  "dropoff_address": "Mumbai, Bandra West",
  "scheduled_at": "2026-06-01T10:30:00Z",
  "notes": "Airport drop",
  "preferences": {
    "ac_required": true,
    "luggage_space": true
  }
}

{
  "category": "payment",
  "priority": "high",
  "subject": "Refund pending for ride",
  "description": "Payment was deducted but ride was cancelled. Refund not received.",
  "ride_id": "{{ride_id}}"
}

{
  "user_ids": ["{{rider_id}}"],
  "user_type": "rider",
  "title": "Special Offer!",
  "body": "Get 20% off your next ride with code SAVE20",
  "channels": ["push", "in_app"]
}
